scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r assets dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r public dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp NullLandingPage.jsx dist/NullLandingPage.jsx 2>/dev/null || true && cp litlink.html dist/litlink.html 2>/dev/null || true && cp tailwind.config.js dist/tailwind.config.js 2>/dev/null || true
